title: Nest Appendage Contract
description: Schema for appendage YAML files. Canonical spec: Nest.md §8. Appendages are networked peers that communicate via API; there is no dependency hierarchy.

An appendage definition has exactly one of `container`, `compose`, or `discovery`. `container`/`compose` are *greenfield*: hub instructs an agent to deploy. `discovery` is *brownfield*: hub matches against containers already running on a server (typically reached via SSH, no install command ever fires). Validator enforces the one-of constraint.

name.description: Lowercase kebab-case. Globally unique across the nest.

version.description: SemVer. Appendages always use the latest available version — pinning is a deploy-time concern, not a contract one.

requirements.description: Server-sizing inputs. The client recommends a server size by summing requirements across selected appendages.

env_from_secrets.description: Secret keys injected as env. Agent decrypts locally (age); hub never sees plaintext.

env.description: Plain-text env vars. Use env_from_secrets for sensitive values once Phase 4 lands.

discovery.description: Brownfield definition. Appendage is reported `installed` when at least one container on `host` matches each regex in `containers.match_any`.

host.description: Hostname/alias the appendage runs on. Must appear in either an agent's reported hostname or `config/ssh-hosts.json`.

items.description: Regex matched against container name (anchored automatically).

match_any.description: Each pattern must have a running container matching it for the appendage to count as installed.

compose.description: Multi-container path. Source can be a git repo (cloned into /opt/nest/data/appendages/<name>/) OR an inline YAML string (written to docker-compose.yml in the same dir). Agent then runs `docker compose -f <file> up -d`. Exactly one of `git` or `inline` is required.

git.description: Git URL to clone (used when source is an external repo).

inline.description: Compose YAML literal — used for embedded/smoke-test stacks where there's no external repo to clone.

file.description: Compose file path relative to the working dir.

init_script.description: One-time setup script run on first install (relative to repo). Skipped if already present.

env.description: Env vars passed to docker compose (forwarded to the .env equivalent for variable interpolation).

routes.description: HTTP routes exposed to the public via Caddy.

apis.description: APIs exposed to peer appendages on the internal network.

consumes.description: APIs this appendage calls on other appendages. Degrade gracefully when `required: false`.

skill.description: OpenClaw integration. Optional — not every appendage is conversational.

handler.description: Relative path from repo root to the skill definition.

wizard.description: Setup UI rendered in client app.

validation.description: Regex pattern applied client-side before encryption.
